message:
refactor(unistd): migrate getrandom/getrusage/alarm/renameat/nice/daemon to native syscalls

Migrate:
- getrandom to sys_getrandom
- getrusage to sys_getrusage
- alarm to sys_alarm (x86_64)
- renameat to sys_renameat2
- nice (getpriority/setpriority) to sys_getpriority/sys_setpriority
- daemon (fork/setsid/chdir/open/dup2/close) to native wrappers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
